author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: shape.rs (broadcast_shapes, c_contiguous_strides, normalize_axis, check_shapes_match, numel) and creation.rs (zeros, ones, full, from_slice, from_vec, tensor, scalar, eye, arange, linspace, rand, randn). 31/31 tests passing. Resolved zero/one ambiguity between ferray Element and num_traits by using fully-qualified <T as num_traits::Zero>::zero() syntax.
